rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 8, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC'S Motion For Attorneys Fees. DENIED. There is no prevailing party for the purposes for recovery of attorney's fees in this action. Action has been voluntarily dismissed before the opposition to summary judgment was due. Motion for summary judgment was not heard; no one appeared for the hearing. Cravens v. State Bd. of Equalization (1997) 52 Cal.App.4th 253 is distinguishable. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 8, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT MILTON MARCIA'S Motion To Vacate Default. DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain his burnden under CCP 473(b). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMY HARRINGTON VS. JIM K. FUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 8, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANTS JIM FUNG, JIN FUNG'S Motion To Vacate Default. DENIED. Defendants failed to meet their burden under CCP 473.5. Defendants failed to show that that the purported lack of actual notice was not caused by their avoidance of service. Service was accomplished by posting and certified mailing to Defendants by a registered process server. No explanation provided for refusal to accept certified mail. =(501/REQ)
